response: The German computer repair technician who may have inspired *Diary of a Cannibal* is Armin Meiwes. He is known for his violent actions and is also referred to as the "Rotenburg Cannibal" or "Der Metzgermeister" (The Master Butcher). The film is possibly inspired by the true-crime story of Meiwes, who posted an online ad seeking someone to be mutilated and eaten.
